title: SquareOne
description: SquareOne is a hardcore progression-based Minecraft modpack that strips you down to the basics and challenges you to rebuild from nothing. Every tool, machine, and discovery must be earned through grit, strategy, and survival.
body:
---

## 🔐 **Multiplayer Access & Support**

<details>
<summary>📘 Click to Expand</summary>

### 🧩 Join the Official SquareOne Server

Access to the **official SquareOne multiplayer server** is a premium feature available exclusively to our **[Discord community](https://discord.gg/hxRJBQVUZK)**. To ensure a quality experience for everyone, server slots are limited and require **manual whitelisting by an admin**.

If you're not whitelisted yet — don’t worry! **Singleplayer mode is always available** and offers the full experience at your own pace.

---

### 📡 Live Server Status

> 📈 **[Check Live Status & Uptime](https://status.xsquareone.com)**  
> 🗺️ **[Explore the Live Dynmap](https://map.xsquareone.com)**

---

### 🚨 Troubleshooting Connection Issues

If you're experiencing issues connecting to the server:

1. ✅ **Ensure you're running the latest version** of the modpack. The server is always synced to the most recent build.
2. 🔁 Try restarting your launcher and Minecraft client.
3. 🧹 Delete `.config` or `mods` folders *only if you’ve made manual changes* that could interfere with launch.
4. 💬 Still stuck? **Reach out directly to Mailo via Discord** for personalized support.

---

### 📜 Server Rules & Conduct

To keep the server fun and fair for everyone, all players must follow these basic rules:

- 🚫 **No griefing, stealing, or unauthorized PvP**
- 📵 **No hacks, x-ray mods, or exploit abuse**
- 💬 **Be respectful** — no hate speech, harassment, or spamming
- 🏗️ **Preserve the world** — don’t strip-mine public areas or spam builds
- 🧠 **Use common sense** — when in doubt, ask

Repeat violations may result in temporary or permanent bans.

</details>

---

**SquareOne** is a survival-driven, progression-focused modpack crafted for players who thrive on earning every advancement. Whether you're punching your first tree or assembling a fully automated factory, *SquareOne* rewards creativity, grit, and determination. With carefully curated performance, tech, exploration, and quality-of-life mods, this pack delivers a deeply immersive Minecraft experience that grows alongside you.

---

### 🔧 **Key Features:**

- ⚙️ **Technology & Automation:** From early machines to complex systems, harness the power of **Mekanism**, **Refined Storage**, and **Thermal Expansion** to engineer your empire from scratch.

- 🌌 **Space & Dimensions:** Venture into the stars with **Ad Astra** and unlock mysterious worlds with **Starlands Dimension** — perfect for explorers seeking the unknown.

- 🚀 **Optimized Performance:** Designed to run smoothly on mid-tier systems using mods like **FerriteCore**, **Rubidium Extra**, **ImmediatelyFast**, and **ModernFix**.

- 🎮 **Polished Visuals:** Enjoy a clean, immersive UI with **Oculus**, **Zoomify**, **BetterF3**, and **FancyMenu** — every menu and interface is a delight.

- 🔊 **Immersive Ambience:** With **Sound Physics Remastered** and **Ambient Sounds**, the world comes alive around you — from rustling leaves to echoing caves.

- 🗺️ **Smart Navigation:** Stay oriented with **Xaero’s Minimap** and **World Map**, while **Advancement Plaques** track your journey like milestones.

- 🏠 **Decor & Customization:** Build beautiful, unique bases using **Fantasy Furniture**, **Diagonal Windows**, **Visual Workbench**, and more.

---

### 🎯 **Ideal For:**
- Survivalists seeking **rewarding, grind-based progression**
- Builders and engineers who love **modular automation**
- Explorers drawn to **vast worlds and deep soundscapes**
- Players needing **low-lag, high-performance gameplay**

---

> In **SquareOne**, every block placed is a step earned. From humble beginnings to high-tech achievements — your empire is waiting.

---
